findings.evidence: Customer-visible page contains internal/operator language: demo, mockup, pre-sale, resend, hi@profitslocal.com, verified.
findings.fix: Rewrite customer-facing copy so it never mentions mockup/demo/internal/Resend/verification workflow.

findings.evidence: No real image or generated visual asset was found in the exported concept.
findings.fix: Use verified business photos, Google/website/social photos, or a clearly project-local AI-generated industry visual before accepting the mockup.

findings.evidence: The page reads like an editorial text prototype rather than a practical local business site.
findings.fix: Use a stronger local-service visual system: real/AI job imagery, bolder CTA band, proof/quote flow, practical service cards, and fewer abstract essay headings.
